description: Fragment of a letter from Musa b. Abi al-Hayy from Alexandria, to Barhun b. Musa ha-Tāhartī, Fustat. Around 1045. The writer lists the goods that he wants to be bought for him in Fustat. Also writes information about ships, including the news about one ship that was attacked and forced to stop in Djerba Island. )Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #461) VMR
description_he: שרידי מכתב ממוסא בן אבי אל-חי, אלכסנדריה, לברהון בן מוסא הטאהרתי, פוסטאט, כ-1045, על סחורות לרכישה ועל ספינה שהותקפה
